    R

    r1t1_PostSavedRetrievable() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T1: Create a post and verify it can be retrieved by its generated ID.
    r1t2_ReplySavedRetrievable() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T2: Create a reply to an existing post and verify it appears under that post's replies.
    r1t3_PostFieldsPreserved() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T3: Verify every field of a post is preserved exactly as provided.
    r1t4_ReplyFieldsPreserved() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T4: Verify every field of a reply is preserved exactly.
    r1t5_HighVolumeSave() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T5: Stress test – save 100 posts each with 2 replies (200 total) and verify all are retrievable.
    r1t6_UniquePostIDs() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T6: Verify that 50 consecutively created posts all receive distinct IDs.
    r1t7_UniqueReplyIDs() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R1-T7: Verify that 50 consecutively created replies all receive distinct IDs.
    r2t1_UpdatePreservesOthers() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R2-T1: Updating one post must not change any other post's data.
    r2t2_DeletePreservesOthers() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R2-T2: Deleting one post must not remove or modify any other post.
    r2t3_InterleavedOperations() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R2-T3: An interleaved sequence of adds, updates, and deletes must leave the storage in a consistent, predictable state.
    r2t4_ReplyCountAfterDeletes() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R2-T4: After deleting some replies, the reply count for a post must reflect the actual remaining replies.
    r2t5_SoftDeleteRetainsData() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R2-T5: A soft-deleted post must retain all its original field values (for display of “original post deleted” messages).
    r3t1_FailedAddNoPollution() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T1: Attempting to add a post with an empty title must fail and must not add anything to storage.
    r3t2_FailedReplyNoPollution() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T2: Attempting to add a reply with an empty body must fail and must not add anything to the reply list.
    r3t3_FailedUpdateNoChange() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T3: A failed update (e.g.
    r3t4_FailedDeleteNoChange() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T4: A failed delete (wrong author) must leave the post active.
    r3t5_ErrorMessagesDescriptive() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T5: Every error path must return a non-null, human-readable message containing the word “Error”.
    r3t6_UsableAfterFailures() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R3-T6: After a sequence of failed operations, the system must still accept and correctly process valid operations.
    r4t1_RepliesSurvivePostDeletion() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R4-T1: After a post is soft-deleted, all its replies must remain accessible via getRepliesByPostID.
    r4t2_DeleteReplySiblingsSafe() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R4-T2: Deleting one reply must not affect any sibling replies.
    r4t3_NullPostIdBlocked() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R4-T3: A reply with a null postID must be rejected without affecting existing data.
    r4t4_DoubleDeletePost() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R4-T4: Attempting to delete an already-deleted post must return an error and must not corrupt the soft-deleted record.
    r4t5_DeleteNonexistentReply() - Static method in class testCases.SystemReliabilityTests
    R4-T5: Attempting to delete a reply that does not exist must return an error and leave all other replies untouched.
    replyTest1_CreateReplyValid() - Static method in class testCases.TestCases
